# Golden file: SQL content edge cases (E7)
# Tests case variations, whitespace, multi-statement, quoting, etc.
format: v1
---
# E7: Mixed case DROP TABLE
command: psql -c "Drop Table users"
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: database.postgresql
rule: psql-drop-table
---
# E7: Extra whitespace in DROP TABLE
command: psql -c "DROP   TABLE   users"
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: database.postgresql
rule: psql-drop-table
---
# E7: MySQL lowercase + whitespace
command: mysql -e "drop database   myapp"
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: database.mysql
rule: mysql-drop-database
---
# E7: Multi-statement with destructive — SELECT then DROP
command: psql -c "SELECT 1; DROP TABLE users"
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: database.postgresql
rule: psql-drop-table
---
# E7: Multi-statement MySQL — SELECT then TRUNCATE
command: mysql -e "SELECT 1; TRUNCATE orders"
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: database.mysql
rule: mysql-truncate
---
# E7: DELETE FROM with WHERE is safe (even trivial WHERE)
command: psql -c "DELETE FROM users WHERE 1=1"
decision: Allow
---
# E7: --command long form matches same as -c
command: psql --command "DROP TABLE users"
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: database.postgresql
rule: psql-drop-table
---
# E7: --execute long form for mysql
command: mysql --execute "DROP TABLE users"
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: database.mysql
rule: mysql-drop-table
---
# E7: Quoted table name
command: psql -c "DROP TABLE \"public\".\"users\""
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: database.postgresql
rule: psql-drop-table
---
# E7: Comment then DROP TABLE — raw string matching catches DROP TABLE
# in the command even when it appears after a SQL comment prefix.
command: psql -c "-- comment DROP TABLE users"
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: database.postgresql
rule: psql-drop-table
